title: Bandages
description: Bandages to quickly heal yourself. Perfect for PVP or PVE!
body:
This datapack adds 4 new items! (called bandages) All of these items will replenish your heart and hunger, while some have added effects.

## All
### Bandage
- Obtainable in most overworld chests
- use `/function give:bandage` to obtain in creative

### Nether Bandage
- Obtainable in most nether chests
- use `/function give:nether_bandage` to obtain in creative
- gives one min of fire resistance 2

### End Bandage
- Obtainable in most end chests
- use `/function give:end_bandage` to obtain in creative
- gives one min of slow falling 2

### Water Bandage
- Obtainable in underwater chests
- use `/function give:water_bandage` to obtain in creative
- gives one min of water breathing 2

## How to use:
To use any of the bandages

1. hold the item in your main hand.
2. Make sure you have nothing in your offhand otherwise it will not work.
3. Right-click and hold, once fully charged you can let go which will consume the item and give you the effects.

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
